name: PRINCETON CAPITAL CORP
summary: Overview and Background Princeton Capital Corporations predecessor was initially incorporated in Florida in 1959 as Electro-Mechanical Services, Inc. In 1998, it changed its name from Electro-Mechanical Services, Inc. to Regal One Corporation (Regal One). In 2005, the then board of directors of Regal One determined it would be in the best interest of shareholders to change the focus of Regal Ones operations to providing financial services through a network of advisors and professionals.
